title: hiraea haberi
intro: Hiraea haberi is a plant species native to New Caledonia, which belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Hiraea haberi is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and possibly lowering blood pressure. Traditional herbal preparations of Hiraea haberi include infusions and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
